$comment: ENG-133 — Performance budgets. Bump baselines deliberately with the regressing PR; never silently. See docs/PERF-BUDGETS.md.

bundleSize.$comment: Per-chunk gzipped size ceiling in KB. Only chunks >= 5 KB gz are tracked here; smaller route splits and micro-icon chunks are noise. Chunk names strip the Rolldown content hash (e.g. SalesPage-Br3xY9Q_.js -> SalesPage).
bundleSize.$retune: ENG-170 — rebudgeted after build.rollupOptions manualChunks split pdf/xlsx/codemirror/dnd out of the entry. index dropped 320->~152 gz (gate-measured 151.79; ceiling 160 tightened to lock the win). exceljs.bare.min/jspdf.es.min/jspdf.plugin.autotable consolidated into xlsx/pdf. html2canvas is a real jspdf transitive (kept).

trpcLatencyMs.$comment: p95 latency budget in milliseconds for a curated set of tRPC procedures. CI runs warmupIterations warmups then samplesPerProcedure measurements, computes p95, and asserts it falls within budget * (1 + thresholdPercent/100). Bias the procedure list toward routes the operator opens repeatedly during the day.
